title: stream_begin
description: Opens a streaming view. The producer (a library author) emits this once, then any number of frame and progress envelopes, then a single stream_end (or stream_error). kind is a renderer-side dispatch keyword identifying the view shape (e.g. ode_trajectory, mcmc_chain). metadata carries kind-specific configuration consumed by the host's extend handler.

expected_frames.description: Total frame count if known; null for unbounded streams.

metadata.description: Kind-specific configuration. Schema is owned by the producer/renderer pair.
